title: Netflix open-sources VOID, an AI framework that erases video objects and rewrites the physics they left behind
summary: Netflix has open-sourced an AI framework that can remove objects from videos and automatically adjusts the physical effects those objects had on the rest of the scene. title: Anthropic discovers "functional emotions" in Claude that influence its behavior

title: Know3D lets users control the hidden back side of 3D objects with text prompts
summary: A research team taps into the world knowledge of large language models to control what appears on the back side of 3D objects using simple text commands.
